user_system_path: /dashboard authenticated app shell renders as a real customer-visible operator surface on desktop and mobile.
forbidden_files_raw: `components/nav/NavPublic.tsx`, `tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts`, controller/autopilot files, `lib/**`, `supabase/migrations/**`, `app/api/stripe/**`, paid generation routes, outbound email paths, schema migrations, destructive DB actions
required_local_proof: npm run build; npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts --reporter=list; npm run lint; npm run health; node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/config/__tests__/docs-source-of-truth.test.ts --reporter=verbose
required_product_proof: Dashboard Playwright proof must show desktop fills the viewport as the real app shell, mobile has no fake phone frame or horizontal overflow, bottom nav swaps panels in-shell, and disconnected/stale sources show a waiting-for-sources brief.
acceptance_condition: /dashboard visual acceptance is proven: the authenticated dashboard renders as the full-screen operator app shell on desktop and mobile, keeps Today/Sources/Recent Work/Account in one route, preserves artifact/action wiring, and shows a grounded waiting-for-sources brief instead of a dead empty state.
stop_condition: Stop if dashboard Playwright proof, build, lint, health, or source-of-truth guard fails; do not broaden into public nav, controller/meta, paid generation, outbound email, Stripe, schema, or destructive DB work.
source_truth_finding: Run only customer-visible product seams now. Priority: dashboard visual acceptance.
required_closure_update: Update ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and append SESSION_HISTORY.md with the dashboard visual acceptance receipt and next customer-visible product seam.
anti_regression_checks: desktop dashboard shell fills the viewport and no longer exposes dashboard-figma-card-frame
mobile dashboard has no fake phone/status-bar frame and no horizontal overflow
mobile bottom nav swaps Today, Sources, Recent Work, and Account in-shell
disconnected or stale sources render a waiting-for-sources Daily Brief with source trail and connect action
approve, skip, copy, daily-value fallback, and latest-artifact behavior remain covered by dashboard-navigation proof
next_command: Run dashboard visual acceptance only. Allowed: .foldera-contract.json | ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md | SESSION_HISTORY.md | app/dashboard/dashboard-page-model.tsx | app/dashboard/page.tsx | app/globals.css | components/dashboard/DashboardDesktopStage.tsx | components/dashboard/DashboardMobileLayout.tsx | components/dashboard/DashboardStateCards.tsx | components/foldera/DashboardSidebar.tsx | tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts. Forbidden: components/nav/NavPublic.tsx | tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts | controller/autopilot files | lib/** | supabase/migrations/** | app/api/stripe/** | paid generation | outbound email | schema migrations | destructive DB actions. Proof: local="npm run build; npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts --reporter=list; npm run lint; npm run health; node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/config/__tests__/docs-source-of-truth.test.ts --reporter=verbose" product="dashboard Playwright proof covers desktop viewport shell, mobile no fake frame/no overflow, in-shell nav, and waiting-for-sources brief." Stop when: proof fails or seam is committed and pushed.
